title: ANNO Not only a Troll ESPIONAGE
display_title: ANNO Not only a Troll ESPIONAGE
wikitext:
[]: ANNO: Not only a Troll. ESPIONAGE. (OMG SPOILERS ) Post by wonderluster » Fri Jul 31, 2009 5:10 pm I would say that with us seemingly being the largest Evangelion group on the net, does anyone else think that Anno could have easily found us and well, you know, made an account? He could be using us for ideas and explanations as to the next movies. Anybody have thoughts on this?

[]: Post by Soul Fire » Fri Jul 31, 2009 5:15 pm Dude you need to put a spoiler or no spoiler warning in your thread title. Oh and as far as Ideas go, I doubt Anno used any of us for ideas unless he reads fan fiction. There were a lot of things in this most recent movie that none of us saw coming or had predicted.

[]: Post by Legendary » Fri Jul 31, 2009 5:39 pm ...Curse you, wonderluster! I would have gotten away with my plan to pretend to be a normal fan from Alaska if you hadn't found me out!

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 31, 2009 5:40 pm @ teh Legendary. While I doubt Anno himself made an account here, it's always possible Gainax or Khara could possibly KNOW of us. *Shrug*

[]: Post by JimmyWolk » Fri Jul 31, 2009 5:45 pm Are we really "the biggest on the net"? Even if we are, I'd guess they'd rather take a look at Japanese sites. Unless they're particularly out for purely Gaijin ideas to surprise the Japanese audience.

[]: Post by wonderluster » Fri Jul 31, 2009 6:15 pm Legendary wrote: ...Curse you, wonderluster! I would have gotten away with my plan to pretend to be a normal fan from Alaska if you hadn't found me out!

[]: Post by obama » Fri Jul 31, 2009 7:42 pm Barong wrote: No

[]: Post by Dartz » Sat Aug 01, 2009 4:19 am Why does this thread need a spoiler tag? There aren't any spoilers in here. That said, I heard rumours that some of the Gainax panelists at a US con were reading Shinji and 40k a while back... so they are aware of our existance...

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Aug 01, 2009 10:56 am Dartz wrote: Why does this thread need a spoiler tag? There aren't any spoilers in here.

[]: Re: ANNO: Not only a Troll. ESPIONAGE. (OMG SPOILERS ) Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Aug 01, 2009 3:30 pm wonderluster wrote: Anybody have thoughts on this?

[]: Re: ANNO: Not only a Troll. ESPIONAGE. (OMG SPOILERS ) Post by Marduk » Sat Aug 01, 2009 4:13 pm Mr. Tines wrote: wonderluster wrote: Anybody have thoughts on this?

[]: Post by wonderluster » Sat Aug 01, 2009 8:09 pm I would say that if there was any other site it would be Eva R. But Im pretty sure they've been inactive for years

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Aug 01, 2009 8:19 pm Speaking of trolling(?) and no this is no joke, there's THIS little gem courtesy of AchtungAffen in IRC the other day: [2009-07-31 11:50:32] <AchtungAffen> Not long ago I read fragments about a Tsurumaki interview in which he said the following: [2009-07-31 11:50:50] <AchtungAffen> "We didn't even know what type of personality the new character should have until well into the production of 2.0" [2009-07-31 11:51:00] <honsou> mari reminds us that "we are watching a giant robot show" [2009-07-31 11:51:01] <AchtungAffen> "Her name was going to be Mariko, but got changed halfway" [2009-07-31 11:51:08] <honsou> well that makes sense [2009-07-31 11:51:20] <honsou> seeing as her main part was in the end [2009-07-31 11:51:24] <honsou> and you didnt really see her any other time [2009-07-31 11:51:25] <AchtungAffen> It does, he also said that they didn't know exactly where to insert her [2009-07-31 11:51:53] <AchtungAffen> Which makes me feel a little skeptic about the every scene meant something

[]: Post by Axell » Sun Aug 02, 2009 12:09 am So Anno is making this stuff up as he goes. Again. Well it worked out the first time.

[]: Post by OKdesuKA » Sun Aug 02, 2009 4:10 am ^It's better that way because it makes everyone look like a moron afterwords for thinking they "know" the series.

[]: Post by GAP » Sun Aug 02, 2009 1:23 pm Espionage? Anno? Has this been done before?

[]: Post by The Invincible Shinji » Sun Aug 02, 2009 1:50 pm Anno's a secret agent man.

[]: Post by Defectron » Sun Aug 02, 2009 2:04 pm Anno was Maggotmaster and CitizenGeek Anyway, this is a ll a bit fuzzy since its been a very long time since I read it. But I seem to recall the pilot of eva unit 4 in the fanfiction "Eva-R" was named Mari. And as I recall this was the only fanfic officially approved by Gainax. Coincedence?

[]: Post by The Invincible Shinji » Sun Aug 02, 2009 2:08 pm I never read Eva-R but i didn't know it was approved by Gainax.
